programme.desc: Ty performs surgery on a mare, while Amy and the family work to bottle-feed its twin foals.

programme.desc: Two orphans face coldheartedness when they ask their favorite children's TV host (Ned Beatty) to adopt them.

programme.desc: The Ingalls family, returning from a trip to the city, is stopped by a U.S. marshal looking for a Sioux renegade.

programme.desc: A farm boy (Mitch Vogel) takes Mr. Edward's tales to heart and heads to the big city.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Founder's Day festivities promise fun and friendly competition for all except aging logger Jim Tyler, who fears losing the log chopping contest to a younger Charles Ingalls.

programme.title: Love, Again
programme.desc: A couple on the verge of a divorce must put aside their differences while planning their daughter's wedding, only to find that their own marriage may be worth saving after all.

programme.title: Love at First Dance
programme.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's former most eligible bachelor how to dance for his extravagant wedding. As the dance lessons progress, complications ensue when feelings begin to develop between the student and the instructor.

programme.desc: Amy is upset with Ty when he purchases a vintage motorcycle; Caleb leaves for a rodeo in Montana.

programme.desc: The Coulter baby is late, but Faith assures them it's fine. By the time Rosemary goes into labor, the entire town is there to support her; Madeline tries to stay in Hope Valley.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary and Lee's baby brings up memories of Rosemary's own mother and questions about her past. Meanwhile, the kids feel left out of the hot springs with all the tourists.

programme.desc: When a former student visits, Elizabeth thinks she may need her help. Meanwhile, Lucas orders something for all of Hope Valley to enjoy -- if they can get it to work.

programme.title: Love at First Bark
programme.desc: A single woman with a new, out of control German shepherd turns to a handsome dog trainer for help. As they make progress with the dog, she realizes she may be developing feelings for the trainer.

programme.title: One Summer
programme.desc: Jack takes his son and daughter to his late wife's beachside hometown hoping to heal and grow closer.

programme.title: Fairfield Road
programme.desc: A man (Jesse Metcalfe) finds sanctuary in Cape Cod after losing his job and his girlfriend.

programme.title: Fit for a Prince
programme.desc: A promising seamstress designs dresses for a charity ball hoping to impress the royal guest, but the dresses -- and a possible romance -- seem destined for disaster.
